success.$description: Solid fill hosting text.on-success. green.600 (pre-OKLCH-regen step) gave neither white nor gray.950 text 4.5:1 (4.39:1 / 4.13:1) — green.700 gives white text 6.50:1 (verified 2026-07-18, Phase 4).

neutral.$description: Fifth status-tone fill, for neutral/offline-style indicators (e.g. Avatar's offline status dot). gray.500 on bg.surface: 3.25:1 light / 4.34:1 dark, both pass WCAG 1.4.11 non-text contrast (3:1) — re-verified 2026-07-18 (Phase 4, OKLCH regen), shared across all 4 themes since gray.500 uniquely satisfies both.

neutral-strong.$description: Solid neutral fill for hosting text (Badge's solid variant, neutral tone) — bg.neutral (gray.500) is only verified for the 3:1 non-text case. gray.600 with white text gives 4.70:1, passing everywhere — shared across all 4 themes (re-verified 2026-07-18, Phase 4 OKLCH regen).

tertiary.$description: gray.500 fails AA (needs 4.5:1) for this token's literal-text uses (Text color="tertiary", Divider label, Input placeholder). gray.600 gives 4.70:1 (re-verified 2026-07-18, Phase 4 OKLCH regen), still lighter/more muted than text.secondary (gray.700).

on-danger.$description: Text on a solid bg.danger fill. White on red.600 = 5.10:1, passes AA (re-verified 2026-07-18, Phase 4 OKLCH regen). Dark themes use gray.950 instead — see purple-dark.json / emerald-dark.json.

on-info.$description: Text on a solid bg.info fill (Badge solid variant). White on blue.600 = 4.71:1, passes AA (re-verified 2026-07-18, Phase 4 OKLCH regen). Dark themes use gray.950 instead — see purple-dark.json / emerald-dark.json.

on-success.$description: Text on a solid bg.success fill (Badge solid variant). Post-OKLCH-regen (Phase 4, 2026-07-18): light-theme bg.success is green.700, where white gives 6.50:1. Dark theme keeps gray.950 against green.500 (5.91:1) — white fails there (3.07:1) — so this token is now theme-specific rather than shared; see purple-dark.json / emerald-dark.json.

on-warning.$description: Text on a solid bg.warning fill (Badge solid variant). Post-OKLCH-regen (Phase 4, 2026-07-18): light-theme bg.warning (amber.600) gives white 4.78:1. Dark theme keeps gray.950 against amber.500 (5.49:1) — white fails there (3.31:1) — so this token is now theme-specific; see purple-dark.json / emerald-dark.json.

on-neutral.$description: Text on a solid bg.neutral-strong fill (Badge solid variant). White on gray.600 = 4.70:1, passes everywhere — shared across all 4 themes (re-verified 2026-07-18, Phase 4 OKLCH regen).

success.$description: green.800 on bg.success-subtle (green.100) gives 8.42:1 (re-verified 2026-07-18, Phase 4 OKLCH regen — originally fixed in Phase 3 when the HSL-derived scales gave green.700 only 4.08:1, failing AA).

secondary.$description: gray.400 on bg.surface was 2.32:1, failing the WCAG 1.4.11 non-text floor (3:1) — found during the Phase 4 icon-contrast sweep (2026-07-18) while this token was still unused by any shipped component. gray.500 gives 3.25:1, and stays more muted than icon.default (gray.600, 4.70:1).
